title: Record async background compaction default contract
prompt: Create reports/async-compaction-default.md with sections for Default on, Background mode, Blocking fallback, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Async Compaction Default Contract

## Default on
async_compaction experimental flag defaults true (zero-config long sessions)

## Background mode
pre-rot full compaction at ~60% usage while the turn continues; TUI shows compact-bg

## Blocking fallback
sync soft trigger (~75%) and hard block (~92%) still wait for compaction before the next step

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/micro vitest + /status Bench gate
